_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: NRG-1β similarly induced phosphorylation of the PI-3 kinase substrate Akt after only 5 minutes of stimulation, with consistently elevated levels of phospho-Akt persisting out to 3 hours post-stimulation
details: Successfully detected NRG-1β induced Akt phosphorylation after 5 minutes of stimulation with consistently elevated levels persisting to 3 hours
